pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.3.1.RELEASE to align with Java 11 support and latest features.
Update project version to 1.1.3.RELEASE.
Refine project description and add metadata like URL and license.
Set Java version property to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.3+ and many modern libraries require Java 11+; compiling with Java 8 source/target settings against these dependencies may fail or produce incompatible bytecode.
